prompt_text:
### Demographics: 75-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Normal
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Alzheimer's Disease
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 52.4 kg; Height 166.9 cm; BMI 18.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/90 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.6%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 6.2%), FPG (12 months ago 202mg/dL; 9 months ago 170mg/dL; 6 months ago 157mg/dL; 3 months ago 190mg/dL; current 137mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 52.1kg; 9 months ago 49.9kg; 6 months ago 51.7kg; 3 months ago 49.1kg; current 52.4kg), Height (12 months ago 166.9cm; 9 months ago 166.9cm; 6 months ago 166.9cm; 3 months ago 166.9cm; current 166.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 18.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 127mmHg; 3 months ago 123mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 87mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 91mmHg; 3 months ago 88mmHg; current 90mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 22U/L), AST (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 10U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 13U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 15mg/g; 9 months ago 14mg/g; 6 months ago 20mg/g; 3 months ago 14mg/g; current 16mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 100mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 99mg/dL; 3 months ago 100mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 125mg/dL; 9 months ago 109mg/dL; 6 months ago 113mg/dL; 3 months ago 127mg/dL; current 120mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.9g/dL; current 12.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.30 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
